name: goalrun
description: Goal-driven agent skills for software engineering

scripts.typecheck: tsc --build packages/core packages/security packages/harness packages/reporter packages/cli
scripts.release:check: pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.release:latest: echo 'ERROR: Manual confirmation required.' && echo 'Are you SURE you want to publish to latest? This is the default tag for all npm installs.' && echo 'Type: pnpm -r publish --tag latest'
